notes: High-risk HPV (16/18/…); E6/E7 are constitutively expressed after integration and are validated TIL/TCR/vaccine targets (E6 degrades p53; E7 inactivates RB)
support_scope: supports cervical E6/E7 T-cell targetability; cross-cohort association and integration-mode support require additional anchors

notes: Latent episome; targetable antigens depend on the latency program — latency II (LMP1/LMP2A/EBNA1) in NPC and EBV+ HL; latency I (EBNA1) in BL. EBV-specific CTLs give durable responses
support_scope: supports LMP1/LMP2 CTL targetability in EBV-associated lymphoma; EBNA1 and NPC/STAD/BL latency programs require additional anchors

notes: Clonal HBV integration in HCC retains/expresses HBx and HBsAg (preS/S); HBx is the principal oncogenic transactivator
support_scope: supports HBV integration in HCC; HBx/HBsAg targetability and expression need separate therapeutic/mechanistic anchors

notes: Clonally integrated Merkel-cell polyomavirus with a truncated large T (LT) plus small T (sT); both T antigens are constitutively expressed in virus-positive Merkel cell carcinoma
support_scope: supports clonal integration in Merkel cell carcinoma; truncated LT/sT expression/targetability needs source-local anchor

notes: KSHV/HHV8 latent episome tethered to host chromatin by LANA (ORF73); LANA is expressed in essentially all KS spindle cells
support_scope: review-level support for KSHV/HHV8 latency and LANA expression in Kaposi sarcoma

notes: Clonal proviral integration in adult T-cell leukaemia/lymphoma (ATLL); Tax drives early transformation, HBZ is constitutively expressed and maintains it. ATLL is not yet a registry cancer code.
support_scope: review-level support for HTLV-1 integration and Tax/HBZ biology in ATLL
